name: Tomato Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 tomatoes (or 1 can of whole peeled tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice in a 9 x 13 glass baking dish and cover the bottom.
2. Arrange the pork chops on top of the rice.
3. Slice the onion and tomatoes and layer them over the pork chops.
4. Pour water into the pan so that it covers the pork chops.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until the pork chops are cooked through.
